---
id: execute-metadata-changes
title: "Execute staged metadata changes"
description: "Submits staged subname creations, subname deletions, and record updates for a namespace. The response reflects either direct execution or Safe proposal mode."
sidebar_label: "Execute staged metadata changes"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: classic-api//enscribe-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Execute staged metadata changes"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/orgs/{orgId}/metadata"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Submits staged subname creations, subname deletions, and record updates for a namespace. The response reflects either direct execution or Safe proposal mode.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
